generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we stood united after the 2023 cyber attacks? Our alliances kept us safe then, and they will again. Some politicians want to cut back on our commitments, saying it's about 'budget responsibility'. But who will protect us when the next crisis hits? Our neighbors in the alliance have our backs - we need to have theirs. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
